Charges: Unlimited
AC: 16
Effect: Shield of Flame (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 5.0) at Level 45
WT: 4.0 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD
Race: HUM ELF HEF VAH DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

# Jul 30 2004 at 2:51 PM Rating: Decent
Syanu
Scholar
47 posts
No, the Ragefire/Naggy arms are the same spell as this, so it will not stack with them any more than getting two Virtue from two different clerics would stack.

Looted and won one today in Seb..Found on Froglok Armorer in the Bartender camp. Armorer isnt tough, and he doesnt always drop something. First time we killed him he dropped nothing. Second time got bracer. PC on Innoruuk server is 1.5k max out. Have fun with this one bards =)

▲ Page top
Spell Damage Return
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 10:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756616511
Scholar
25 posts
Hello All,

Just as the actual spell [castable by Mages] increases in damage as the caster levels, the bracer's damage will increase as the Bard levels. At level 45 [when the effect is first useable] the bracer returns 9 damage per strike.
▲ Page top
RE: Spell Damage Return
QuoteReply
# Nov 30 2001 at 4:56 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592342702400
295 posts
At 20 the spell does 8 points, at 22 and higher it does 9 points. So you can pretty much just call it a 9 point dmg shield =)
▲ Page top
